steps.description: Database: create iw_core_instance table (id PK=1 CHECK, instance_id UUID, created_at), seed one row via gen_random_uuid(), add IwCoreInstance ORM model. Idempotent, reversible.
Code review: S01 (single-row invariant enforced at DB, idempotent seed, downgrade safe, ORM model matches convention, FTS triggers not broken).

Backend: orch/db/identity.py (verify_instance_identity, BootstrapNotice, InstanceMismatchError); wire into daemon startup health check in orch/daemon/main.py; add iw db-identity {show|check} CLI; extend ai-core.sh cmd_status to render PASS/FAIL line; add IW_CORE_EXPECTED_INSTANCE_ID to .env.example.

Code review: S03 (verify fail-fast in daemon, no partial-start path; CLI exit codes correct; ai-core.sh bash guards correct; env var parsed with trim/case-insensitive UUID; bootstrap mode is one-shot INFO not per-poll).

API: add /healthz/identity endpoint to dashboard (200 match / 503 mismatch / 200 bootstrap); register a FastAPI lifespan/startup event that aborts app startup on mismatch; ensure endpoint bypasses auth.
Code review: S05 (startup event raises, not swallows; endpoint response shape consistent; auth-bypass intentional and documented; no DB session leaks on hot path).

Tests: unit (identity module: match/mismatch/missing-row/bootstrap/env parsing); integration (testcontainer with different UUID → daemon startup refuses, dashboard /healthz/identity returns 503); migration downgrade-upgrade round trip.
Code review: S07 (tests fail on pre-change code; testcontainer compliance per tests/CLAUDE.md; FTS triggers applied; no live-DB connections; fixture reuse; pytest markers correct).

Final cross-layer review: daemon + dashboard + CLI + bash gates all agree on identity state; AC1–AC6 coverage; rollback plan sound; no regressions on adjacent daemon/dashboard paths; CLAUDE.md compliance.
